snps.effect_template: 8q24 region variant associated with colorectal cancer risk (OR ~1.3).
11q23.1 locus variant. Modest effect on colorectal cancer risk.
SMAD7 variant associated with colorectal cancer risk (OR ~1.18).
BMP4 region variant involved in bone morphogenetic protein signaling and colorectal cancer susceptibility.
RHPN2 variant affecting colorectal cancer risk with modest effect size.
GREM1 variant in gremlin 1 pathway associated with increased colorectal cancer risk (OR ~1.26).
EIF3H variant in translation initiation factor pathway linked to colorectal cancer susceptibility.

recommendation_template: Standard screening guidelines apply. Discuss family history with your doctor for personalized screening schedule.

studies.title: Genome-wide association scan identifies a colorectal cancer susceptibility locus on 8q24
studies.finding: rs6983267 G allele OR=1.27 for colorectal cancer

studies.title: Meta-analysis of genome-wide association data identifies four new susceptibility loci for colorectal cancer
studies.finding: Identified multiple colorectal cancer susceptibility loci including SMAD7, BMP4, RHPN2, GREM1, and EIF3H variants
